query:
SELECT DISTINCT c.code, c.title, COUNT(DISTINCT l.id) as lessonsWithoutQuizzes
FROM courses c
JOIN lessons l ON l.courseId = c.id
LEFT JOIN quiz_questions q ON q.lessonId = l.id
WHERE q.id IS NULL
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.title
ORDER BY c.code;

FROM courses c
JOIN lessons l ON l.courseId = c.id
LEFT JOIN quiz_questions q ON q.lessonId = l.id
WHERE q.id IS NULL
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.title
